title: Figure 1 in A flotation/sieving method to detect Echinococcus multilocularis and Toxocara spp. eggs in soil by real-time PCR
author: Umhang, Gérald
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 1. Geographical distribution of the collected feces. For each fecal sample, one soil sample was collected under the fecal sample and another one between 50 cm and 1 m from the first one.
steps_raw: Figure 1. Geographical distribution of the collected feces. For each fecal sample, one soil sample was collected under the fecal sample and another one between 50 cm and 1 m from the first one.
